document.title: Auto glass claims
document.text: Northstar Mutual auto glass claims must be reported through the Aurora portal within 30 calendar days. Windshield repair has a 75 dollar deductible. A police report is not required.

document.title: Travel interruption claims
document.text: Trip interruption claims use form T-19 and supporting receipts must arrive within 45 calendar days. The reimbursement limit is 3,500 dollars per covered traveler.

document.title: Claims API idempotency
document.text: Claims API clients send the Idempotency-Key header on create requests. Keys remain valid for a 24 hour replay window. Reusing a key with a different payload returns HTTP 409.
